case_title: RAVACAST, INC. VS. MARY JANE MCRORY

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RAVACAST, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,696.53 FILED BY RAVACAST, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCRORY, MARY JANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-15-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE. SERVICE FEE $35.00. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAVACAST, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
